_meta.notes: Family lockouts are the second-most-common cause of failed applications, after 5/24. Track the FAMILY-level rules separately from per-product rules.

chase_sapphire.rule: Family-level 48-month SUB lockout. Cannot earn SUB on any Sapphire if you currently hold any OR earned a Sapphire SUB in past 48 months.
chase_sapphire.workaround: Product-change Sapphire to Freedom Unlimited or Freedom Flex before reapplying. Wait 48 months from prior SUB earn date.

chase_ink.rule: NO family-level lockout (as of 2026). Each card has its own 24-month SUB clock per product.
chase_ink.workaround: Stagger applications 1/30 (or 1/90 to be safe) and rotate through all four products.
chase_ink.notes: Ink applications are submitted through chase.com/business; many users churn 2-3 Inks per year between P1 and P2.

amex_platinum.rule: Each variant has its OWN once-per-lifetime SUB clock. Personal Plat and Business Plat are separate. Schwab/MS/Goldman flavors are separate from Personal Plat.
amex_platinum.workaround: After earning Personal Plat SUB, you can still get Schwab Plat SUB and Business Plat SUB.
amex_platinum.notes: Watch for offer-language variations. Some elevated offers explicitly omit the 'related cards' language; those are the SUB-second-time opportunities.

amex_gold.rule: Personal Gold and Business Gold are separate SUB clocks.

amex_delta.rule: Each product has its own once-per-lifetime clock per offer terms. Business and personal versions of same tier are separate.

amex_hilton.rule: Each product has separate once-per-lifetime. Often elevated offers via Resy or referral.

amex_bonvoy.rule: Cross-issuer lockout with Chase Bonvoy cards. See application-rules.json -> cross_issuer_rules.chase_amex_marriott_24mo.

chase_marriott.rule: Cross-issuer lockout with Amex Bonvoy cards. 24-month SUB clock per product, with cross-family restrictions.

citi_strata.rule: 48-month SUB rule per product, with some offers extending lockout across the Strata family. Read offer terms.

citi_aadvantage.rule: Each product has a 48-month SUB clock. Cross-issuer with Barclays AAdvantage Aviator.

barclays_aadvantage.rule: 24-month SUB clock per product. Often the only path to a second AA SUB after Citi AA, since Barclays is a separate issuer.

capital_one_venture.rule: 48-month SUB clock per product on most. Venture X has its own.

bilt.rule: Single product. Important context: Bilt has NO traditional SUB. Earning is via 'Rent Day' double points and 1x rent payments. The 'churn' angle is rotation rewards, not SUB.
